stemHtml: Before commencing an IFR flight to an airport which only has a single instrument approach procedure (and which requires GNSS), you read in a NOTAM that GNSS is (1) _____ at that location. As a result, (2) _____.

options.a: (1) unavailable; (2) the flight should be discontinued
options.b: (1) available; (2) the flight should be discontinued
